column1: # 2bRAD-tag vs whole-genome between-strain distance concordance, recomputed with Strain2bScan.
# WGS: bottom-3000 canonical 21-mer MinHash Mash distance. 2bRAD: per-genome Strain2bScan
# `build` tag sets (14-enzyme default and BcgI-alone). distance = -ln(2J/(1+J)); pairs with
# zero overlap in either space excluded (n_pairs_undefined). 16S deferred (needs an rRNA finder,
# e.g. barrnap; not installed here). PPTX_2brad = prior Strain2bfunc value (slide 23) for reference.
# NOTE: Spearman is the reported concordance metric (rank/Mantel-style, robust). Pearson is
# transform-sensitive for LOW-DIVERSITY species (S. epidermidis: bimodal within/between-cluster
# distances + faster 2bRAD saturation -> low Pearson despite Spearman 0.92); do not read it as
# non-reproduction. All Spearman 0.89-0.996 reproduce the prior 2bRAD~whole-genome agreement.
